reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio ubicada en medio de la meseta patagónica.  Brinda la posibilidad de un oportuno descanso, cargar combustible, tomar algo, comprar golosinas, bebidas frías o alimentos para consumir en el viaje y hacer uso de sus sanitarios, los cuales en general están limpios y bien mantenidos.

(Translated by Google)
This service station is located in the middle of the Patagonian plateau. It offers the opportunity for a timely rest, refueling, refreshments, snacks, cold drinks, or food to eat during the trip, and access to its restrooms, which are generally clean and well-maintained.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLbWJQaC1nRRAB
